# serverless-plugins — engineering docs

Working notes for the CoorpAcademy ownership of `serverless-plugins` (CLXP-103).

| Doc | What it covers |
|---|---|
| [`serverless-v4-migration-review.md`](./serverless-v4-migration-review.md) | Critical review of the v4 migration & PR #264. What's right, what to challenge, recommended path. |
| [`open-pr-triage.md`](./open-pr-triage.md) | Triage of all 17 open PRs: keep / merge-as-is / merge-after-work / re-implement / close. |
| [`open-issue-triage.md`](./open-issue-triage.md) | Triage of all 65 open issues against current code: fixed-on-release / real bug / keep / ditch + 2 investigation clusters, with a per-issue action plan. |

> Status: 2026-06-20 — read-only analysis. PR triage (2026-06-19) + issue triage (2026-06-20). No code changed.
</content>

# Open ISSUE triage — `serverless-plugins`

> **Date:** 2026-06-20 · **65 open issues** · **Status:** READ-ONLY analysis. No code changed.
> Companions: [`open-pr-triage.md`](./open-pr-triage.md) · [`serverless-v4-migration-review.md`](./serverless-v4-migration-review.md) · [`plans/00-goal.md`](./plans/00-goal.md)
>
> Each issue was judged against the **current code on `feat/serverless-v4-support`** (not against the
> title or the version the reporter was on). "Fixed" means the fix is present on this branch and ships
> the moment we `lerna publish`. Numbers in `()` after a verdict are related issue/PR refs.

## How to read this

Four buckets, exactly as requested:

1. **✅ FIXED — close on release** — our v4 branch already resolves it. Verify, reply, close when published.
2. **🐞 REAL BUG — we should fix** — genuine defect in *current* code. Has an action plan below.
3. **🧩 KEEP — valuable, can't ditch** — legitimate feature/bug we want, but bigger or deferred (Tier-2).
4. **🗑️ DITCH — close** — stale, environment/config, user error, out-of-scope, wontfix, or not our code.

Plus two **investigation clusters** (recurring symptoms that need a repro before we can bucket each one).

---

## Headline findings

1. **The v4 release alone closes a cluster.** `#263, #232, #182, #219, #165, #145, #169` are already fixed
   on this branch. `#263` (the `@serverless/utils/log` crash) is the most-active, most-recent issue in the
   tracker — publishing the v4 versions is the single highest-leverage action.
2. **`aws-sdk@^2` is the next big theme.** *All four* plugins still `require('aws-sdk/clients/...')`
   (v2, EOL). This is the root of `#248, #252, #260` and the noisy maintenance-mode warnings. A v3 migration
   is the natural Tier-2 epic after v4 lands.
3. **Two long-standing clusters dominate the bug tail:** SQS "lambda not triggered / only runs once"
   (`#210, #255, #198, #147, #132, …`) and DynamoDB-streams "shard iterator / replay / empty table"
   (`#54, #82, #84, #154, #163, #164, #178`). Most need a clean repro on the v4 base before we touch code.
4. **DLQ / autoCreate is a real feature gap** repeatedly reported (`#65, #133, #167, #87`) — the same need
   behind PR `#183`. Worth owning.
5. **`serverless-offline-ssm-provider` has no source in this monorepo** (only a `README.md` is tracked).
   `#105, #152, #186` may not be ours to fix here — confirm where that package lives before acting.
6. **`#259` is not our repo** (reporter uses none of our plugins) — close.

---

## Master table (all 65)

| 197 | ddb | ECONNREFUSED on SIGINT | ✅ FIXED? | Verify — tied to #169; mostly dynamodb-local env |

| 195 | sqs | `variablesResolutionMode: 20210326` | 🗑️ DITCH | Serverless v2-era, obsolete |

| 239 | sqs | lift + localstack guide | 🗑️ DITCH | HOWTO; its fix (#211 queueName) already landed |
| 184 | ddb | doesn't work with Dynalite | 🗑️ DITCH | Dynalite lacks streams — not our bug |
| 259 | core | serverless runs forever | 🗑️ DITCH | Reporter uses none of our plugins |
| 254 | meta | still maintained? | 🗑️ DITCH | Reply "yes, v4 landing" & close |
| 105 | ssm | example config file | 🗑️ DITCH* | Docs Q — *ssm-provider source not in repo |
| 152 | ssm | clarify intended behavior | 🗑️ DITCH* | Docs Q — *ssm-provider source not in repo |

---

## ✅ FIXED — close on release (7 verified + 3 to verify)

These resolve the moment the v4 versions publish. Reply on each thanking the reporter, link the release.

- **#263 — `@serverless/utils/log` not found (v4).** Root cause of the whole v4 breakage. Branch replaces
  the hard `require('@serverless/utils/log')` with the injected `{log}` 3rd arg + `src/log.js`
  console-fallback shim. **The flagship close.**
- **#232 — `Cannot read property 'debug' of undefined`.** Same logger problem from the v3 era;
  `normalizeLog(log)` now defaults every level, so a missing logger can't crash.
- **#182 / #219 — `this.region` undefined.** `sqs.js` now passes `this.options.region` to `SQSEvent`
  (was `this.region`, never set). #219 is a duplicate — close both, credit zlalvani (PR #166).
- **#165 — ReadCountOutOfRange with `batchSize > 1`.** `getMessages` caps `MaxNumberOfMessages` at 10 and
  loops to fill `batchSize`, so SQS never sees an out-of-range count. Ask reporter to confirm on the new build.
- **#145 — `this._waitFor is not a function`.** `_describeTable`'s catch now recurses `_describeTable`
  (a real method), not the non-existent `_waitFor`. (See #241 for the *flip side* — it now retries forever.)
- **#169 — prevents serverless from exiting.** `_listenForTermination` now actually handles `SIGINT/SIGTERM`
  (`await this.end()` → `process.exit(0)`), instead of swallowing the first signal. Close.

**Verify before closing (likely fixed, confirm with a repro):**
- **#226 — uncaught handler error kills process.** `job()` wraps `runHandler()` in try/catch and logs via
  `this.log.warning`, so a throwing handler no longer tears down the process. Confirm, then close.
- **#250 — CJS/ESM kinesis build error.** Current code uses the deliberate dynamic `import('serverless-offline/lambda')`;
  the old mixed-module crash should be gone on the v4 base. Reproduce on a no-`"type"` package and close.
- **#197 — ECONNREFUSED on SIGINT.** Largely the `serverless-dynamodb-local` child process; the #169 fix
  should make shutdown clean. Verify against the sample repo.

---

## 🐞 REAL BUG — we should fix (current-code defects)

Small, well-scoped, high signal-to-noise. Good candidates for the next PR after v4 lands.

- **#200 — Missing QueueName with `Fn::Join` ARN.** `index.js#_resolveFn` only unwraps `Fn::GetAtt`/`Arn`;
  a `Fn::Join` ARN stays an object, so `SQSEventDefinition`'s `switch('string')` falls through and the ARN
  becomes `…:undefined`. **Fix:** resolve `Fn::Join` (and `Ref AWS::AccountId`) in `_resolveFn`, and make
  `sqs-event-definition.js` guard non-string arns. Same family as #189, #74.
- **#262 — `queueName` extraction (and array support).** The `switch('string')` construct is fragile and
  misses object/array shapes (overlaps #200). **Fix:** replace with explicit `if/else` + missing-prop guard.
  *Optionally* let `queueName` be an array → one listener per queue (the reporter's ask, niche).
- **#225 — explicit queue creation fails on real AWS / sqslite.** `_createQueue` builds `Attributes` from the
  *entire* `Properties` block, which includes `QueueName` → `InvalidAttributeName: Unknown Attribute QueueName`.
  ElasticMQ tolerates it; AWS/sqslite don't. **Fix:** `omit(['QueueName'], properties)` before `mapValues`.
- **#159 — FIFO queues not honored on autoCreate.** Autocreate ignores `FifoQueue`/the `.fifo` suffix, so a
  FIFO queue is created as standard and `MessageGroupId` is rejected. **Fix:** pass the `FifoQueue`
  (+ `ContentBasedDeduplication`) attributes through, or derive from a `.fifo` name. Overlaps the #225 fix.
- **#158 — idle CPU spin.** `defaultOptions` omits `functionCleanupIdleTimeSeconds`, so serverless-offline's
  `LambdaFunctionPool` does `setTimeout(f, NaN)` → busy loop. **Fix:** add `functionCleanupIdleTimeSeconds: 60`
  to `defaultOptions` in each `index.js`. Cheap, broad win.
- **#241 — hangs if table/stream missing.** Flip side of the #145 fix: `_describeTable` now recurses forever
  when the table doesn't exist, so serverless-offline never finishes booting. **Fix:** bound the retries and,
  on exhaustion, `log.warning` + skip that stream (don't block startup). Pairs with the #98 no-stream guard.
- **#103 — DynamoDB stream-ARN gaps.** `tableName` is now supported (`_resolveFn` checks `event.tableName`).
  Still missing: an `arn` null-check before `Fn::GetAtt`, and `Fn::ImportValue` / `Ref` ARN forms. **Fix:**
  add the guard + the two resolver branches. Update README example accordingly.
- **#101 — `__unused_stage__` non-alphanumeric** (serverless-apigateway-access-logs). Stage-name templating
  emits `ApiGatewayStage__unused_stage__`. **Fix:** correct the logical-id/stage derivation in that plugin's
  `src/index.js`. Self-contained.
- **#160 — broken docs.** The README "how it works" links to a removed `…-sqs-integration/docker-compose.yml`
  (404). **Fix:** point to the live `tests/serverless-plugins-integration/` setup. Trivial doc fix.
- **#186 — ssm-provider default `Parameter.Type`.** Real one-liner (default `Type: 'String'`), **but** the
  ssm-provider source is *not tracked in this monorepo* (only its README). Confirm where the package lives
  before doing anything; may belong to another repo / be unmaintained here.

---

## 🧩 KEEP — valuable, can't ditch (features / Tier-2)

Legitimate, repeatedly requested — keep open with a labelled roadmap. Don't close as "won't do".

- **DLQ + redrive cluster — #65, #133, #167, #87.** The most-requested SQS feature: on `autoCreate`, create
  dead-letter queues *first*, then the main queue with its `RedrivePolicy`. Today the redrive target doesn't
  exist → `NonExistentQueue`. This is exactly PR **#183**'s idea — own it. (#87 also touches
  `MessageRetentionPeriod`, partly an ElasticMQ limitation — set expectations there.)
- **#221 — partial batch failure reporting.** Support `FunctionResponseTypes: ReportBatchItemFailures`:
  only delete messages *not* in the handler's `batchItemFailures`. Modern, well-defined, high value.
- **#227 — `maximumBatchingWindow`.** `WaitTimeSeconds` is hard-coded to 5 in `getMessages`; map the event's
  `maximumBatchingWindow` onto it. Small, but currently a silent no-op.
- **#242 — DynamoDB `filterPatterns`.** Apply event-source filter patterns locally before invoking the
  handler. Larger (needs an AWS-compatible filter evaluator) but genuinely useful.
- **#64 — apply access-logs to an existing stack.** `ApiGatewayStage … already exists` when the stage
  predates the plugin. Support attaching to a pre-existing stage. apigateway-access-logs.
- **aws-sdk v3 epic — #248, #252, #260.** All plugins still use `aws-sdk@^2` (EOL, maintenance warnings).
  Migrate to modular `@aws-sdk/client-*`. #260 (deserialization 500/HTML) likely shakes out here too.
  Big, coordinated, post-v4. The natural next milestone.
- **#127 — Kinesis `ProvisionedThroughputExceededException`.** Local reads are too aggressive against a
  shared dev stream. Add a configurable read interval / backoff. Question-flavoured but actionable.

---

## 🔍 Investigation clusters (need a repro on the v4 base before bucketing)

These share symptoms; chasing them individually wastes effort. Build one repro harness per cluster on the
v4 branch, then split into FIX / KEEP / DITCH.

**A — SQS "lambda not triggered / only runs once": #210, #255, #198, #147, #132, #161, #123, #170, #135.**
Current `_sqsEvent` re-adds `job` to a `PQueue` after each poll, so steady-state polling *should* work.
Most reports are old and smell of config (ElasticMQ `receiveMessageWait`, `autoCreate:false` against a
missing queue, `--useDocker`, non-default port + endpoint mismatch). Reproduce against ElasticMQ on the v4
build; several likely close as fixed/config. `#132` (SQS + HTTP) specifically should be re-tested — current
`_createLambda` builds *all* lambdas, not just SQS ones.

**B — DynamoDB-streams iterator/replay: #54, #82, #84, #163, #178, #154, #164, #238.** Two sub-themes:
(1) `dynamodb-streams-readable` emits `end` prematurely so `TRIM_HORIZON` only fires on boot (#54 → #82, #84,
#163); (2) shard-iterator expiry on long sessions (#154, #164) and replay/OOM on restart (#178). These point
at the `dynamodb-streams-readable` package and the `startingPosition` handling — the real engineering work in
this repo. Needs a DynamoDB-Local + stream repro. `#238`'s `tableName` schema warning is separable (register
the property in the plugin schema).

**C — env/runtime edge cases: #143, #102.** "Variables outside the handler break on the 2nd message",
`--useWorkerThreads` resets `process.env`. These are most likely **core `serverless-offline`/Lambda-pool**
behavior, not ours. Confirm against a vanilla serverless-offline setup; if it reproduces without our plugin,
redirect upstream and close.

---

## 🗑️ DITCH — close (with a short, kind rationale)

- **#146 — bundle ElasticMQ** — already `wontfix`; out of scope (keep the plugin thin). Close.
- **#130 — docker-compose http/https to ElasticMQ** — config (use `http://…:9324`, not implicit https). Answer & close.
- **#156 — subscribe offline SQS to offline SNS** — cross-plugin orchestration, out of scope. Close with pointer.
- **#195 — `variablesResolutionMode: 20210326`** — Serverless v2-era resolver flag; obsolete under v3/v4. Close as stale.
- **#222 — locally skip a plugin** — low value; documented answer is "don't list the plugin for that run". Close.
- **#239 — lift + localstack guide** — a community HOWTO, not a bug; the modification it required (`queueName`
  override) already shipped as #211. Thank, optionally fold into docs, close.
- **#184 — Dynalite** — Dynalite doesn't implement DynamoDB Streams; not fixable here. Recommend DynamoDB-Local/LocalStack, close.
- **#259 — serverless runs forever** — reporter's plugin list contains *none* of ours; not this repo. Close/redirect.
- **#254 — still maintained?** — answer "yes — v4 support is landing now", link the branch/PR, close.
- **#105 / #152 — ssm-provider docs questions** — answer if quick, but note ssm-provider source isn't in this
  monorepo; verify ownership. Close as docs/support.

---

## Suggested execution order (when we leave read-only)

1. **Publish the v4 versions.** Immediately reply+close the ✅ bucket (`#263, #232, #182, #219, #165, #145, #169`),
   and verify-then-close `#226, #250, #197`. Biggest, cheapest win.
2. **Quick-bug PR** (one branch): `#225`, `#159`, `#158`, `#200`/`#262`, `#241`, `#103`, `#160`. All small,
   current-code, low-risk, well-scoped.
3. **DLQ/autoCreate feature** (`#65/#133/#167/#87`, owning PR #183's idea).
4. **Investigation harnesses** for clusters A and B on the v4 base; re-bucket their issues from real repros.
5. **aws-sdk v3 epic** (`#248/#252/#260`) as the next milestone.
6. **Close the 🗑️ bucket** with rationale; convert `#239` to docs if useful.

> Net of 65 open issues: **~10 close on release**, **~10 real small bugs**, **~9 keep (features/Tier-2)**,
> **~24 need a repro (2 clusters + edge cases)**, **~12 ditch**. Counts overlap where issues are duplicates.
</content>
</invoke>

# GOAL — own the v4 migration & re-implement worthwhile community PRs

> **Owner:** CoorpAcademy (CLXP-103) · **Branch:** `feat/serverless-v4-support` · **Status doc.**
> This is the north star. Every plan doc in `docs/plans/` serves this goal. See `[[serverless-v4-migration-review]]`
> and `[[open-pr-triage]]` for the analysis this builds on.

## The one-sentence goal

Ship **our own** correct, tested, v3-compatible Serverless Framework **v4 support** across all four
`serverless-offline-*` plugins, folding in the worthwhile ideas from the open community PRs as code we
own — then push a clean PR (crediting original authors) and close the dead/stale/dependabot PRs with rationale.

## Done-state (measurable acceptance criteria)

**A — v4 migration (the must-do):**
- [ ] Zero `require('@serverless/utils/log')` anywhere in `packages/`.
- [ ] Zero `serverless.cli.log(...)` calls; all logging via the injected `{log}` 3rd arg (console-fallback).
- [ ] All 4 plugins load and run under **serverless v4 AND v3** (back-compatible by construction).
- [ ] Peers stay **wide** (`serverless-offline: ">=11"`); version bumps are **minor** (back-compatible).

**B — re-implemented community PRs (owned by us):**
- [ ] #166 — `this.region` → `this.options.region` in **all three** affected packages (sqs, kinesis, ddb).
- [ ] #253 — SQS delete-batch entry `Id`s are unique within a batch (index-based).
- [ ] #211 — SQS `queueName` override from `custom` config.
- [ ] #98 — DynamoDB "table does not have streams" explicit error.
- [ ] #100 — Kinesis bounded retry + error logging (mirror DynamoDB's bounded retry).
- [ ] #249 — Kinesis awaits `lambda.create(...)`.

**Quality / ownership:**
- [ ] Docker-free **AVA unit tests** added for the pure logic touched (offline plugins start with none).
- [ ] `npm run eslint` is **green** (lint + Prettier).
- [ ] Each changed package: README updated, `package.json` `files` updated if a file was added, version bumped.
- [ ] Foundation docs (`architecture`, `conventions`, `testing-and-ci`, `publishing-and-versioning`) + skill + agent committed.

**Close-out:**
- [ ] PR pushed to `CoorpAcademy/serverless-plugins` with a meticulous description + author credits.
- [ ] Close-list rationale recorded for #99, #117, #137 and the 5 dependabot PRs.
- [ ] Deferred (with reasons + follow-up plan): #183 (DLQ autocreate), #168 (start-without-events/host).

## Explicitly OUT of scope (and why)

- **#183 DLQ autocreate & #168 host/start changes** — high value but require Docker + serverless-v4
  integration to verify safely; shipping unverified SQS-autocreate changes risks regressions. Deferred to
  a Tier-2 PR once the integration lane is validated (`[[07-deferred-and-closed-prs]]`).
- **#117 enabled flag, #137 termination, #99 error logging** — low value / superseded / dead architecture.
- **Publishing to npm** — done by a human via `lerna publish` after review (canary first). Out of this PR.
- **Consumer-service bumps & deploys** (api-scorm/push) — separate CLXP-103 follow-up, not this repo.

## Canonical artifacts every package agent must use verbatim

**The log shim — create `packages/<pkg>/src/log.js` identically in each touched package:**

```js
const noop = () => {};

const defaultLog = {
  debug: noop,
  info: console.log.bind(console),
  notice: console.log.bind(console),
  warning: console.warn.bind(console),
  error: console.error.bind(console),
  success: console.log.bind(console)
};

const normalizeLog = log => ({...defaultLog, ...log}); // spread of null/undefined is a no-op

module.exports = {defaultLog, normalizeLog};
```

**Constructor contract (each `src/index.js`):**

```js
const {normalizeLog} = require('./log');
// ...
constructor(serverless, cliOptions, {log} = {}) {
  this.cliOptions = cliOptions;
  this.serverless = serverless;
  this.log = normalizeLog(log);
  this.hooks = { /* unchanged */ };
}
```

- Replace `this.serverless.cli.log(x)` → `this.log.notice(x)`.
- Replace `log.debug(...)` → `this.log.debug(...)`; `log.warn/warning(...)` → `this.log.warning(...)`.
- Thread the logger into the emulator sub-module: `new S3(this.lambda, resources, this.options, this.log)`,
  and in the sub-module `constructor(lambda, resources, options, log) { this.log = normalizeLog(log); }`.
- Add `src/log.js` to the package's `package.json` `files` array.

## Workflow shape (Step 4)

Parallel agents **partitioned by package** (no shared files → no conflicts):
`s3`, `sqs`, `kinesis`, `dynamodb-streams` — each follows its plan doc. Then a **cross-cutting** agent
(root `package.json`, `.travis.yml`, root README), then **adversarial review**, then gate + PR.

## Plan index

- `[[01-package-s3]]` · `[[02-package-sqs]]` · `[[03-package-kinesis]]` · `[[04-package-dynamodb-streams]]`
- `[[05-cross-cutting-peers-ci-docs]]` · `[[06-pr-and-closeout]]` · `[[07-deferred-and-closed-prs]]`
</content>

service: translated-language-system
frameworkVersion: '3'

plugins:
  - serverless-esbuild
  - serverless-offline-ssm
  - serverless-offline-sqs
  - serverless-offline-dynamodb-streams
  - serverless-offline

custom:
  # Stage-specific configuration
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}

  # Single source of truth for physical resource names
  resourceNames:
    jobsTable: translated-language-system--dynamodb-jobs-${self:custom.stage}
    promptsVersionsTable: translated-language-system--prompts-versions-${self:custom.stage}
    promptsLiveTable: translated-language-system--prompts-live-${self:custom.stage}
    reviewResultsTable: translated-language-system--dynamodb-review-results-${self:custom.stage}
    translationBucket: translated-language-system--s3-artifacts-${self:custom.stage}
    traceBucket:
      dev: ""
      staging: go1-dbx-coorp-tls-traces-qa
      prod: go1-dbx-coorp-tls-traces-prod

  # Common tags for CloudFormation resources (referenced via ${self:custom.resourceTags})
  resourceTags:
    - Key: Service
      Value: translated-language-system
    - Key: Environment
      Value: ${self:custom.stage}

  # Log level per stage (all debug for now, tighten later)
  logLevel:
    dev: debug
    staging: debug
    prod: debug

  # Content API base URL per stage
  contentApiBaseUrl:
    dev: https://content-staging.coorpacademy.com
    staging: https://content-staging.coorpacademy.com
    prod: https://content.coorpacademy.com

  # Content-catalogue base branch per stage
  contentCatalogueBaseBranch:
    dev: cockpitRecette-digital-2016
    staging: cockpitRecette-digital-2016
    prod: cockpit-digital-2016

  # Prompt mode per stage: 'composition' uses multi-prompt pipeline, 'monolithic' uses single prompt
  promptMode:
    dev: monolithic
    staging: monolithic
    prod: monolithic

  # Review sampling: number of translation pairs to sample for quality review
  reviewSampleSize:
    dev: 30
    staging: 20
    prod: 200

  # Review dynamic sampling: ratio-based with min/max bounds
  reviewSampleRatio:
    dev: '0.50'
    staging: '0.10'
    prod: '0.20'
  reviewSampleMin:
    dev: '10'
    staging: '20'
    prod: '30'
  reviewSampleMax:
    dev: '100'
    staging: '100'
    prod: '500'

  # Review batching: max translation pairs per Bedrock batch
  reviewMaxPairsPerBatch:
    dev: 10
    staging: 10
    prod: 10

  # esbuild configuration
  esbuild:
    bundle: true
    minify: false
    sourcemap: true
    exclude:
      - '@aws-sdk/*'
    platform: node
    target: node22
    concurrency: 10
    loader:
      .md: text

  # Queue visibility timeouts (must be >= lambda timeout)
  queueVisibility:
    triageWorker: 960
    scormOrchestrator: 900
    coorpOrchestrator: 330
    textTranslate: 960
    transcribe: 660
    textToSpeech: 660
    judgeTrigger: 330
    document: 600
    textToSpeechProcessor: 660  # >= lambda timeout (600s)
    finalizer: 660

  # DLQ max receive counts (cheap/retriable: 2, expensive/fail-fast: 1)
  maxReceiveCount:
    triageWorker: 3
    scormOrchestrator: 3
    coorpOrchestrator: 2
    textTranslate: 3  # Bedrock-sensitive: 3 attempts for TPM throttle recovery
    transcribe: 2
    textToSpeech: 2
    judgeTrigger: 3  # Bedrock-sensitive: 3 attempts for TPM throttle recovery
    document: 2
    textToSpeechProcessor: 2
    finalizer: 6 # Headroom for batch queue backpressure (25+ jobs × 5 concurrent slots)

  # DynamoDB capacity configuration per stage
  dynamoCapacity:
    write:
      dev:
        min: 1
        max: 2
        target: 80
        scaleInCooldown: 60
        scaleOutCooldown: 60
      staging:
        min: 1
        max: 200
        target: 80
        scaleInCooldown: 600
        scaleOutCooldown: 60
      prod:
        min: 50
        max: 1000
        target: 80
        scaleInCooldown: 3600
        scaleOutCooldown: 5
    read:
      dev:
        min: 1
        max: 2
        target: 80
        scaleInCooldown: 60
        scaleOutCooldown: 60
      staging:
        min: 1
        max: 10000
        target: 80
        scaleInCooldown: 600
        scaleOutCooldown: 60
      prod:
        min: 50
        max: 40000
        target: 80
        scaleInCooldown: 3600
        scaleOutCooldown: 5

  # GO1 stage-specific configuration
  go1:
    mtlsBaseUrl:
      dev: https://mtls-gateway.go1.cloud/content-gateway/v3
      staging: https://mtls-gateway.go1.cloud/content-gateway/v3
      prod: https://mtls-gateway.go1.co/content-gateway/v3
    apiBaseUrl:
      dev: https://api.qa.go1.cloud
      staging: https://api.qa.go1.cloud
      prod: https://api.go1.co
    authMethod:
      dev: BASIC
      staging: MTLS
      prod: MTLS
    moocApiBaseUrl:
      dev: https://go1-staging.coorpacademy.com
      test: https://go1-staging.coorpacademy.com
      staging: https://go1-staging.coorpacademy.com
      prod: https://go1.coorpacademy.com

  # === Per-lambda env var groups (DRY with YAML anchors) ===
  envGroups:
    elevenlabs: &elevenlabsEnv
      ELEVENLABS_API_KEY: ${ssm:/credentials/global/translated-language-system/elevenlabs-api-key}
      ELEVENLABS_API_BASE: ${env:ELEVENLABS_API_BASE, 'https://api.elevenlabs.io'}
      ELEVENLABS_LANGUAGE_MODE: ${env:ELEVENLABS_LANGUAGE_MODE, 'accent'}
      ELEVENLABS_DISABLE_VOICE_CLONING: ${env:ELEVENLABS_DISABLE_VOICE_CLONING, 'true'}
    promptTables: &promptTablesEnv
      PROMPTS_VERSIONS_TABLE: ${self:custom.resourceNames.promptsVersionsTable}
      PROMPTS_LIVE_TABLE: ${self:custom.resourceNames.promptsLiveTable}
    jwtSecret: &jwtSecretEnv
      JWT_SECRET: ${ssm:/credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/jwt-secret}
    bedrock: &bedrockEnv
      BEDROCK_MODEL_ID: ${ssm:/credentials/global/translated-language-system/bedrock-model-id}
    contentApi: &contentApiEnv
      CONTENT_API_BASE_URL: ${self:custom.contentApiBaseUrl.${self:custom.stage}}
      CONTENT_API_AUTH_TOKEN: ${ssm:/credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/content-api-auth-token}
    allQueues: &allQueuesEnv
      SCORM_ORCHESTRATOR_QUEUE_URL: !Ref ScormOrchestratorQueue
      COORP_ORCHESTRATOR_QUEUE_URL: !Ref CoorpOrchestratorQueue
      TEXT_TRANSLATE_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TextTranslateQueue
      TRANSCRIBE_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TranscribeQueue
      TEXT_TO_SPEECH_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TextToSpeechQueue
      JUDGE_TRIGGER_QUEUE_URL: !Ref JudgeTriggerQueue
      DOCUMENT_QUEUE_URL: !Ref DocumentQueue
    dispatchQueues: &dispatchQueuesEnv
      TEXT_TRANSLATE_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TextTranslateQueue
      TRANSCRIBE_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TranscribeQueue
      TEXT_TO_SPEECH_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TextToSpeechQueue
      DOCUMENT_QUEUE_URL: !Ref DocumentQueue
    go1Credentials: &go1Env
      GO1_API_BASE_URL: ${env:GO1_API_BASE_URL, '${self:custom.go1.apiBaseUrl.${self:custom.stage}}'}
      GO1_MTLS_API_BASE_URL: ${env:GO1_MTLS_API_BASE_URL, '${self:custom.go1.mtlsBaseUrl.${self:custom.stage}}'}
      GO1_ROOT_JWT_SSM_PARAM: /credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/go1-root-jwt
      GO1_CLIENT_CERT_SSM_PARAM: /credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/go1-client-cert
      GO1_CLIENT_KEY_SSM_PARAM: /credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/go1-client-key
      GO1_CA_CERT_SSM_PARAM: /credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/go1-ca-cert
      GO1_AUTHENTICATION_METHOD: ${env:GO1_AUTHENTICATION_METHOD, '${self:custom.go1.authMethod.${self:custom.stage}}'}

  # Serverless offline configuration
  serverless-offline:
    httpPort: 3000
    lambdaPort: 3002
    noPrependStageInUrl: true

  serverless-offline-sqs:
    autoCreate: false
    endpoint: http://localhost:9324
    region: eu-west-1
    accessKeyId: local
    secretAccessKey: local

  serverless-offline-dynamodb-streams:
    apiVersion: '2013-12-02'
    endpoint: http://0.0.0.0:8000
    region: eu-west-1
    accessKeyId: local
    secretAccessKey: local

  # SSM offline configuration for local development
  serverless-offline-ssm:
    stages:
      - offline
      - dev
      - test
    ssm:
      '/credentials/global/translated-language-system/bedrock-model-id': 'eu.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929-v1:0'
      '/credentials/global/translated-language-system/google-credentials': '{"type":"service_account","project_id":"test-project","private_key":"-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----\ntest\n-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----\n","client_email":"test@test.iam.gserviceaccount.com","auth_uri":"https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth","token_uri":"https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"}'
      '/credentials/global/translated-language-system/elevenlabs-api-key': 'elevenlabs-api-key'
      '/credentials/dev/translated-language-system/jwt-secret': 'dev-jwt-secret-local-12345'
      '/credentials/dev/translated-language-system/go1-root-jwt': 'mock-go1-root-jwt-token'
      '/credentials/dev/translated-language-system/go1-client-cert': 'mock-client-cert-pem'
      '/credentials/dev/translated-language-system/go1-client-key': 'mock-client-key-pem'
      '/credentials/dev/translated-language-system/go1-ca-cert': 'mock-ca-cert-pem'
      '/credentials/dev/translated-language-system/github-token': 'ghp-mock-token-for-local-dev'
      '/credentials/dev/translated-language-system/content-api-auth-token': 'mock-content-api-token'
      '/credentials/test/translated-language-system/content-api-auth-token': 'mock-content-api-token'
      '/credentials/global/translated-language-system/jw-api-key': 'mock-jw-api-key'
      '/credentials/global/translated-language-system/jw-secret-key': 'mock-jw-secret-key'

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs22.x
  region: eu-west-1
  stage: ${self:custom.stage}
  timeout: 30
  memorySize: 1024
  architecture: arm64

  # Tags applied to all Lambda functions (searchable in AWS Console)
  tags:
    Service: translated-language-system
    Environment: ${self:custom.stage}

  # Environment variables available to all functions (shared base)
  environment:
    STAGE: ${self:custom.stage}
    AWS_NODEJS_CONNECTION_REUSE_ENABLED: '1'
    LOG_LEVEL: ${self:custom.logLevel.${self:custom.stage}}
    # DynamoDB + S3 (from custom.resourceNames — single source of truth)
    JOBS_TABLE: ${self:custom.resourceNames.jobsTable}
    TRANSLATION_BUCKET: ${self:custom.resourceNames.translationBucket}
    # Local service endpoints (empty in prod, set via shell env for local dev / CI)
    DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT: ${env:DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT, ''}
    DYNAMODB_ACCESS_KEY: ${env:DYNAMODB_ACCESS_KEY, ''}
    DYNAMODB_SECRET_KEY: ${env:DYNAMODB_SECRET_KEY, ''}
    S3_ENDPOINT: ${env:S3_ENDPOINT, ''}
    S3_ACCESS_KEY: ${env:S3_ACCESS_KEY, ''}
    S3_SECRET_KEY: ${env:S3_SECRET_KEY, ''}
    SQS_ENDPOINT: ${env:SQS_ENDPOINT, ''}
    SSM_ENDPOINT: ${env:SSM_ENDPOINT, ''}
    TRANSCRIBE_ENDPOINT: ${env:TRANSCRIBE_ENDPOINT, ''}
    BEDROCK_ENDPOINT: ${env:BEDROCK_ENDPOINT, ''}
    TRACES_S3_BUCKET: ${self:custom.resourceNames.traceBucket.${self:custom.stage}}
    TRACES_S3_FORMAT: ndjson
    TRACES_S3_PREFIX: spans
    TRACES_S3_REGION: ap-southeast-2

  # IAM permissions for all functions
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        # DynamoDB permissions — wildcard scoped to TLS tables for this stage
        # (collapses 6 explicit ARNs to 2 entries to stay under 10240-byte inline policy cap)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
            - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
          Resource:
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/translated-language-system--*-${self:custom.stage}'
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/translated-language-system--*-${self:custom.stage}/index/*'
        # DynamoDB Streams (for package, job-lifecycle, and job-finalizer lambdas)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:DescribeStream
            - dynamodb:GetRecords
            - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
            - dynamodb:ListStreams
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt JobsTable.StreamArn
        # S3 permissions (internal translation bucket)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:DeleteObject
            - s3:ListBucket
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt TranslationBucket.Arn
            - !Sub '${TranslationBucket.Arn}/*'
        # S3 permissions (external Coorpacademy content bucket — read + write media-scripts)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:PutObject
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:s3:::cockpit.coorpacademy.com/*
        # S3 permissions (static content bucket — write translated documents)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:s3:::static.coorpacademy.com/*
        # S3 permissions (Go1 trace buckets — write span exports)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:s3:::go1-dbx-coorp-tls-traces-qa/spans/*
            - arn:aws:s3:::go1-dbx-coorp-tls-traces-prod/spans/*
        # SQS permissions
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sqs:SendMessage
            - sqs:ReceiveMessage
            - sqs:DeleteMessage
            - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
          Resource:
            # All TLS SQS queues (primary + DLQs) — wildcard scoped to service name
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:translated-language-system--sqs-*-${self:custom.stage}'
        # Bedrock permissions
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - bedrock:InvokeModel
            - bedrock:InvokeModelWithResponseStream
          Resource: '*'
        # AWS Transcribe permissions (submit only — no polling)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - transcribe:StartTranscriptionJob
          Resource: '*'
        # SSM Parameter Store (for credentials at runtime)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - ssm:GetParameter
          Resource:
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/credentials/global/translated-language-system/*'
            - !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/*'

package:
  individually: true

functions:
  # ============================================
  # TRIAGE API LAMBDA - Entry point (API Gateway)
  # ============================================
  triageApi:
    name: translated-language-system--triage-api-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/triage-api/handler.handler
    description: Validate translation request, create jobs, enqueue for processing
    timeout: 10
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      <<: *jwtSecretEnv
      PROMPT_MODE: ${self:custom.promptMode.${self:custom.stage}, 'monolithic'}
      TRIAGE_WORKER_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TriageWorkerQueue
    events:
      - http:
          path: /translate
          method: POST
          cors: true

  # ============================================
  # TRIAGE WORKER LAMBDA - Heavy I/O (SQS)
  # ============================================
  triageWorker:
    name: translated-language-system--triage-worker-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/triage-worker/handler.handler
    description: Stream source, create tasks, dispatch to processing pipelines
    timeout: 900
    memorySize: 1024
    ephemeralStorageSize: 10240
    environment:
      <<: [*allQueuesEnv, *bedrockEnv]
      PROMPT_MODE: ${self:custom.promptMode.${self:custom.stage}, 'monolithic'}
      ELEVENLABS_LANGUAGE_MODE: ${env:ELEVENLABS_LANGUAGE_MODE, 'accent'}
      ELEVENLABS_DISABLE_VOICE_CLONING: ${env:ELEVENLABS_DISABLE_VOICE_CLONING, 'true'}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TriageWorkerQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # SCORM ORCHESTRATOR LAMBDA
  # ============================================
  scormOrchestrator:
    name: translated-language-system--scorm-orchestrator-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/scorm-orchestrator/handler.handler
    description: Orchestrate SCORM translation workflow, fan-out to processing queues
    timeout: 900
    memorySize: 2048
    ephemeralStorageSize: 10240
    reservedConcurrency: 3
    environment:
      <<: [*dispatchQueuesEnv, *contentApiEnv]
      COORP_ORCHESTRATOR_QUEUE_URL: !Ref CoorpOrchestratorQueue
      COORP_CONTENT_BUCKET: cockpit.coorpacademy.com
      MOOC_API_BASE_URL: ${env:MOOC_API_BASE_URL, '${self:custom.go1.moocApiBaseUrl.${self:custom.stage}}'}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt ScormOrchestratorQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # COORP ORCHESTRATOR LAMBDA
  # ============================================
  coorpOrchestrator:
    name: translated-language-system--coorp-orchestrator-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/coorp-orchestrator/handler.handler
    description: Orchestrate Coorpacademy content translation, extract locale files and dispatch to text-translate
    timeout: 300
    memorySize: 1024
    ephemeralStorageSize: 2048
    environment:
      <<: [*dispatchQueuesEnv, *contentApiEnv]
      GITHUB_TOKEN: ${ssm:/credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/github-token}
      CONTENT_CATALOGUE_REPO: CoorpAcademy/content-digital-core
      CONTENT_CATALOGUE_BASE_BRANCH: ${self:custom.contentCatalogueBaseBranch.${self:custom.stage}}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt CoorpOrchestratorQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # TEXT TRANSLATE LAMBDA (replaces uiLocale, contentLocale)
  # ============================================
  textTranslate:
    name: translated-language-system--text-translate-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/text-translate/handler.handler
    description: Translate text strings (UI + content) using Bedrock Claude
    timeout: 900
    memorySize: 2048
    reservedConcurrency: 10 # Bedrock TPM guard: 10 × 5 batch concurrency = 50 max parallel calls
    environment:
      <<: [*bedrockEnv, *promptTablesEnv]
      PROMPT_MODE: ${self:custom.promptMode.${self:custom.stage}, 'monolithic'}
      ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD: ${env:ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD, 'true'}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TextTranslateQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # TEXT-TO-SPEECH SUBMIT LAMBDA (Phase 3 - Submit dubbing + sync TTS)
  # ============================================
  textToSpeechSubmit:
    name: translated-language-system--text-to-speech-submit-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/text-to-speech-submit/handler.handler
    description: Submit dubbing to ElevenLabs, run TTS synchronously
    timeout: 600
    memorySize: 4096
    ephemeralStorageSize: 10240
    reservedConcurrency: 5
    layers:
      - arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:446570804799:layer:ffmpeg:2
    environment:
      <<: *elevenlabsEnv
      FFMPEG_PATH: ${env:FFMPEG_PATH, '/opt/bin/ffmpeg'}
      ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD: ${env:ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD, 'true'}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TextToSpeechQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # TEXT-TO-SPEECH POLLER LAMBDA (Phase 3 - Poll dubbing completion)
  # ============================================
  textToSpeechPoller:
    name: translated-language-system--text-to-speech-poller-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/text-to-speech-poller/handler.handler
    description: Poll ElevenLabs for dubbing completion, dispatch to processor
    timeout: 30
    memorySize: 512
    reservedConcurrency: 1
    environment:
      <<: *elevenlabsEnv
      TEXT_TO_SPEECH_PROCESSOR_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TextToSpeechProcessorQueue
      JOBS_TABLE: ${self:custom.resourceNames.jobsTable}
      TRANSLATION_BUCKET: ${self:custom.resourceNames.translationBucket}
      STAGE: ${self:custom.stage}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${self:custom.logLevel.${self:custom.stage}}
    events:
      - schedule:
          rate: rate(2 minutes)
          enabled: true

  # ============================================
  # TEXT-TO-SPEECH PROCESSOR LAMBDA (Phase 3 - Process dubbed videos)
  # ============================================
  textToSpeechProcessor:
    name: translated-language-system--text-to-speech-processor-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/text-to-speech-processor/handler.handler
    description: Process dubbed videos — download, ffmpeg swap, upload, GO1
    timeout: 600
    memorySize: 6144
    ephemeralStorageSize: 10240
    reservedConcurrency: 10
    layers:
      - arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:446570804799:layer:ffmpeg:2
    environment:
      <<: [*elevenlabsEnv, *go1Env]
      FFMPEG_PATH: ${env:FFMPEG_PATH, '/opt/bin/ffmpeg'}
      JOBS_TABLE: ${self:custom.resourceNames.jobsTable}
      TRANSLATION_BUCKET: ${self:custom.resourceNames.translationBucket}
      STAGE: ${self:custom.stage}
      LOG_LEVEL: ${self:custom.logLevel.${self:custom.stage}}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TextToSpeechProcessorQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # DOCUMENT LAMBDA
  # ============================================
  document:
    name: translated-language-system--document-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/document/handler.handler
    description: Translate PDF/DOCX/PPTX/XLSX documents via Google Cloud (TBD)
    timeout: 300
    memorySize: 2048
    ephemeralStorageSize: 2048
    environment:
      DOCUMENT_QUEUE_URL: !Ref DocumentQueue
      GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_SSM_PARAM: /credentials/global/translated-language-system/google-credentials
      ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD: ${env:ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD, 'true'}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt DocumentQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # TRANSCRIBE SUBMIT LAMBDA (SQS → submits job, no polling)
  # ============================================
  transcribeSubmit:
    name: translated-language-system--transcribe-submit-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/transcribe-submit/handler.handler
    description: Submit AWS Transcribe job (no polling) — completion via EventBridge
    timeout: 600
    memorySize: 1024
    ephemeralStorageSize: 2048
    layers:
      - arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:446570804799:layer:ffmpeg:2
    environment:
      FFMPEG_PATH: ${env:FFMPEG_PATH, '/opt/bin/ffmpeg'}
      ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD: ${env:ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD, 'true'}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TranscribeQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # TRANSCRIBE COMPLETE LAMBDA (EventBridge → processes completion)
  # ============================================
  transcribeComplete:
    name: translated-language-system--transcribe-complete-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/transcribe-complete/handler.handler
    description: Process AWS Transcribe completion events via EventBridge
    timeout: 120
    memorySize: 512
    destinations:
      onFailure:
        arn:
          Fn::GetAtt: [TranscribeCompleteDLQ, Arn]
        type: sqs

  # ============================================
  # JOB-LIFECYCLE LAMBDA (DynamoDB Stream - central coordinator)
  # ============================================
  jobLifecycle:
    name: translated-language-system--job-lifecycle-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/job-lifecycle/handler.handler
    description: Central coordinator - phase transitions, task dependency dispatch, circuit breaker
    timeout: 60
    memorySize: 1024
    reservedConcurrency: 10 # DNS burst guard: limits concurrent invocations to prevent FD exhaustion
    environment:
      <<: *allQueuesEnv
      FINALIZER_QUEUE_URL: !Ref FinalizerQueue
    events:
      - stream:
          type: dynamodb
          arn: !GetAtt JobsTable.StreamArn
          batchSize: 10
          startingPosition: LATEST
          bisectBatchOnFunctionError: true
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
          maximumRetryAttempts: 3
          maximumRecordAgeInSeconds: 300
          filterPatterns:
            - eventName: [MODIFY]

  # ============================================
  # JOB-FINALIZER LAMBDA (SQS - package assembly + delivery)
  # ============================================
  jobFinalizer:
    name: translated-language-system--job-finalizer-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/job-finalizer/handler.handler
    description: Assemble final translated package and push to content-gateway
    timeout: 600
    memorySize: 4096
    reservedConcurrency: 3 # PQueue limits each instance to 8 JW req/min (3 × 8 = 24, well under 60 limit)
    ephemeralStorageSize: 10240
    environment:
      <<: [*go1Env, *contentApiEnv]
      GITHUB_TOKEN: ${ssm:/credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/github-token}
      CONTENT_CATALOGUE_REPO: CoorpAcademy/content-digital-core
      CONTENT_CATALOGUE_BASE_BRANCH: ${self:custom.contentCatalogueBaseBranch.${self:custom.stage}}
      VIMEO_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${ssm:/credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/vimeo-access-token, ''}
      JW_API_KEY: ${ssm:/credentials/global/translated-language-system/jw-api-key}
      JW_SECRET_KEY: ${ssm:/credentials/global/translated-language-system/jw-secret-key}
      FINALIZER_QUEUE_URL: !Ref FinalizerQueue
      # Static coorp asset bucket for translated document delivery
      STATIC_COORP_ASSET_BUCKET: static.coorpacademy.com
      S3_COORP_ASSET_BASE: https://s3.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com
      COORP_CONTENT_BUCKET: cockpit.coorpacademy.com
      # Mooc API (Baucis REST — for writing translated locales to content-go1 MongoDB)
      MOOC_API_BASE_URL: ${env:MOOC_API_BASE_URL, '${self:custom.go1.moocApiBaseUrl.${self:custom.stage}}'}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt FinalizerQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # DLQ HANDLER LAMBDA (safety net for zombie tasks)
  # ============================================
  dlqHandler:
    name: translated-language-system--dlq-handler-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/dlq-handler/handler.handler
    description: Process DLQ messages - mark exhausted tasks as failed to unblock phase evaluation
    timeout: 30
    memorySize: 256
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TriageWorkerDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt ScormOrchestratorDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt CoorpOrchestratorDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TextTranslateDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TranscribeDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TextToSpeechDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TextToSpeechProcessorDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt JudgeTriggerDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt DocumentDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt FinalizerDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt TranscribeCompleteDLQ.Arn
          batchSize: 10
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # LIST JOBS LAMBDA (Job Listing API)
  # ============================================
  listJobs:
    name: translated-language-system--list-jobs-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/list-jobs/handler.handler
    description: List translation jobs with filtering and pagination
    timeout: 30
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      JWT_SECRET: ${ssm:/credentials/${self:custom.stage}/translated-language-system/jwt-secret}
    events:
      - http:
          path: /jobs
          method: get
          cors: true

  # ============================================
  # GET JOB STATUS LAMBDA - Polling endpoint
  # ============================================
  getJobStatus:
    name: translated-language-system--get-job-status-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/get-job-status/handler.handler
    description: Get translation job status and progress (polling endpoint)
    timeout: 30
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      <<: *jwtSecretEnv
    events:
      - http:
          path: /jobs/{jobId}
          method: get
          cors: true

  # ============================================
  # REDRIVE LAMBDA - Restart failed tasks
  # ============================================
  redrive:
    name: translated-language-system--redrive-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/redrive/handler.handler
    description: Redrive failed translation job tasks (restart from failure point)
    timeout: 30
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      <<: [*jwtSecretEnv, *allQueuesEnv]
      FINALIZER_QUEUE_URL: !Ref FinalizerQueue
      TRIAGE_WORKER_QUEUE_URL: !Ref TriageWorkerQueue
    events:
      - http:
          path: /jobs/{jobId}/redrive
          method: post
          cors: true

  # ============================================
  # REVIEW LAMBDA (Phase 2 - Quality Gate)
  # ============================================
  review:
    name: translated-language-system--review-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/review/handler.handler
    description: Phase 2 quality gate - evaluate translation quality via Bedrock Claude
    timeout: 300
    memorySize: 1024
    reservedConcurrency: 10 # Bedrock TPM guard: 10 × 10 BEDROCK_CONCURRENCY = 100 max parallel calls
    environment:
      <<: [*bedrockEnv, *promptTablesEnv]
      PROMPT_MODE: ${self:custom.promptMode.${self:custom.stage}, 'monolithic'}
      REVIEW_RESULTS_TABLE: ${self:custom.resourceNames.reviewResultsTable}
      REVIEW_SAMPLE_SIZE: ${self:custom.reviewSampleSize.${self:custom.stage}, '30'}
      REVIEW_SAMPLE_RATIO: ${self:custom.reviewSampleRatio.${self:custom.stage}, ''}
      REVIEW_SAMPLE_MIN: ${self:custom.reviewSampleMin.${self:custom.stage}, ''}
      REVIEW_SAMPLE_MAX: ${self:custom.reviewSampleMax.${self:custom.stage}, ''}
      REVIEW_MAX_PAIRS_PER_BATCH: ${self:custom.reviewMaxPairsPerBatch.${self:custom.stage}, '10'}
      ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD: ${env:ENABLE_CACHE_GUARD, 'true'}
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt JudgeTriggerQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1
          functionResponseType: ReportBatchItemFailures

  # ============================================
  # PROMPT SYSTEM LAMBDAS
  # ============================================
  getSystemPrompt:
    name: translated-language-system--get-system-prompt-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/prompts/get-system.handler
    description: Get system prompt by type (supports ?version=N)
    timeout: 10
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      <<: [*jwtSecretEnv, *promptTablesEnv]
    events:
      - http:
          path: /prompts/system/{type}
          method: get
          cors: true

  composePrompt:
    name: translated-language-system--compose-prompt-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/prompts/compose.handler
    description: Compose full translation prompt from pipeline
    timeout: 10
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      <<: [*jwtSecretEnv, *promptTablesEnv]
    events:
      - http:
          path: /prompts/compose
          method: post
          cors: true

  createPromptVersion:
    name: translated-language-system--create-prompt-version-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/prompts/create-version.handler
    description: Create new prompt version
    timeout: 10
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      <<: [*jwtSecretEnv, *promptTablesEnv]
    events:
      - http:
          path: /prompts/{type}/{name}
          method: put
          cors: true

  activatePromptVersion:
    name: translated-language-system--activate-prompt-ver-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/prompts/activate.handler
    description: Activate a specific prompt version to live
    timeout: 10
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      <<: [*jwtSecretEnv, *promptTablesEnv]
    events:
      - http:
          path: /prompts/{type}/{name}/activate
          method: post
          cors: true

  # ============================================
  # SWAGGER LAMBDAS
  # ============================================
  swaggerJson:
    name: translated-language-system--swagger-json-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/swagger/handler.json
    description: Serve OpenAPI spec as JSON
    timeout: 10
    memorySize: 256
    package:
      patterns:
        - 'swagger.yaml'
    events:
      - http:
          path: /swagger.json
          method: get
          cors: true

  swaggerUi:
    name: translated-language-system--swagger-ui-${self:custom.stage}
    handler: src/swagger/handler.ui
    description: Serve Swagger UI HTML page
    timeout: 10
    memorySize: 256
    events:
      - http:
          path: /swagger
          method: get
          cors: true

resources:
  # DynamoDB tables, auto-scaling, and outputs
  - ${file(./serverless-dynamodb.yml):resources}

  # S3, SQS, and other resources
  - Resources:
      # ============================================
      # S3: Translation Bucket
      # ============================================
      TranslationBucket:
        Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
        DeletionPolicy: Retain
        Properties:
          BucketName: ${self:custom.resourceNames.translationBucket}
          PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
            BlockPublicAcls: true
            BlockPublicPolicy: false
            IgnorePublicAcls: true
            RestrictPublicBuckets: false
          BucketEncryption:
            ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
              - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
                  SSEAlgorithm: AES256
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      TranslationBucketPolicy:
        Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
        Properties:
          Bucket: !Ref TranslationBucket
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: AllowPublicReadGO1Delivery
                Effect: Allow
                Principal: '*'
                Action: s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Sub '${TranslationBucket.Arn}/go1-delivery/*'

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Triage Worker Queue + DLQ
      # ============================================
      TriageWorkerDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-triage-worker-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      TriageWorkerQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-triage-worker-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.triageWorker}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt TriageWorkerDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.triageWorker}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: SCORM Orchestrator Queue + DLQ
      # ============================================
      ScormOrchestratorDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-scorm-orchestrator-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600 # 14 days
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      ScormOrchestratorQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-scorm-orchestrator-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.scormOrchestrator}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # 4 days
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt ScormOrchestratorDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.scormOrchestrator}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Coorp Orchestrator Queue + DLQ
      # ============================================
      CoorpOrchestratorDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-coorp-orchestrator-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      CoorpOrchestratorQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-coorp-orchestrator-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.coorpOrchestrator}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt CoorpOrchestratorDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.coorpOrchestrator}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Text Translate Queue + DLQ
      # ============================================
      TextTranslateDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-text-translate-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      TextTranslateQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-text-translate-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.textTranslate}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt TextTranslateDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.textTranslate}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Transcribe Queue + DLQ
      # ============================================
      TranscribeDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-transcribe-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      TranscribeQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-transcribe-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.transcribe}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt TranscribeDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.transcribe}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Text-to-Speech Queue + DLQ (Phase 3)
      # ============================================
      TextToSpeechDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-text-to-speech-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      TextToSpeechQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-text-to-speech-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.textToSpeech}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt TextToSpeechDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.textToSpeech}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Text-to-Speech Processor Queue + DLQ (Poller->Processor dispatch)
      # ============================================
      TextToSpeechProcessorDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-text-to-speech-processor-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      TextToSpeechProcessorQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-text-to-speech-processor-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.textToSpeechProcessor}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt TextToSpeechProcessorDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.textToSpeechProcessor}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Judge Trigger Queue + DLQ (Phase 2)
      # ============================================
      JudgeTriggerDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-judge-trigger-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      JudgeTriggerQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-judge-trigger-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.judgeTrigger}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt JudgeTriggerDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.judgeTrigger}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Finalizer Queue + DLQ
      # ============================================
      FinalizerDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-finalizer-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      FinalizerQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-finalizer-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.finalizer}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt FinalizerDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.finalizer}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Transcribe Complete DLQ (EventBridge failure destination)
      # ============================================
      TranscribeCompleteDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-transcribe-complete-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      # ============================================
      # EventBridge: Transcribe completion rule
      # ============================================
      TranscribeJobStateChangeRule:
        Type: AWS::Events::Rule
        Properties:
          Name: translated-language-system--transcribe-complete-${self:custom.stage}
          Description: Route AWS Transcribe completion events to transcribe-complete lambda
          EventPattern:
            source:
              - aws.transcribe
            detail-type:
              - "Transcribe Job State Change"
            detail:
              TranscriptionJobStatus:
                - COMPLETED
                - FAILED
              TranscriptionJobName:
                - prefix: "tls_"
          State: ENABLED
          Targets:
            - Id: TranscribeCompleteLambda
              Arn: !GetAtt TranscribeCompleteLambdaFunction.Arn

      TranscribeCompletePermission:
        Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
        Properties:
          FunctionName: !Ref TranscribeCompleteLambdaFunction
          Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
          Principal: events.amazonaws.com
          SourceArn: !GetAtt TranscribeJobStateChangeRule.Arn

      # ============================================
      # SQS: Document Queue + DLQ
      # ============================================
      DocumentDLQ:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-document-dlq-${self:custom.stage}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

      DocumentQueue:
        Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
        Properties:
          QueueName: translated-language-system--sqs-document-${self:custom.stage}
          VisibilityTimeout: ${self:custom.queueVisibility.document}
          MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
          RedrivePolicy:
            deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DocumentDLQ.Arn
            maxReceiveCount: ${self:custom.maxReceiveCount.document}
          Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

    Outputs:
      JobsTableName:
        Value: !Ref JobsTable
        Export:
          Name: translated-language-system--dynamodb-jobs-name-${self:custom.stage}
      JobsTableArn:
        Value: !GetAtt JobsTable.Arn
        Export:
          Name: translated-language-system--dynamodb-jobs-arn-${self:custom.stage}
      TranslationBucketName:
        Value: !Ref TranslationBucket
        Export:
          Name: translated-language-system--s3-artifacts-name-${self:custom.stage}
      ApiEndpoint:
        Value: !Sub 'https://${ApiGatewayRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${self:custom.stage}'
        Export:
          Name: translated-language-system--api-endpoint-${self:custom.stage}

# Referenced via ${file(./serverless-dynamodb.yml):resources}

resources:
  Resources:
    # ============================================
    # DYNAMODB: Jobs Table (Single Table Design)
    # ============================================
    JobsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      DeletionPolicy: Retain
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.resourceNames.jobsTable}
        PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
          PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: PK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: SK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: loId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: contentRef
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: taskType
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: status
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: _gsi1pk
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: _taskRefPK
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: completedAt
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: PK
            KeyType: HASH
          - AttributeName: SK
            KeyType: RANGE
        ProvisionedThroughput:
          ReadCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.min}
          WriteCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.min}
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: loId-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: loId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
            ProvisionedThroughput:
              ReadCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.min}
              WriteCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.min}
          - IndexName: taskType-status-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: taskType
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: status
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: INCLUDE
              NonKeyAttributes:
                - PK
                - SK
                - taskId
                - input
                - updatedAt
            ProvisionedThroughput:
              ReadCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.min}
              WriteCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.min}
          - IndexName: job-list-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: _gsi1pk
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
            ProvisionedThroughput:
              ReadCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.min}
              WriteCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.min}
          - IndexName: contentRef-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: contentRef
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
            ProvisionedThroughput:
              ReadCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.min}
              WriteCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.min}
          - IndexName: taskRef-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: _taskRefPK
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: completedAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: INCLUDE
              NonKeyAttributes:
                - PK
                - SK
                - taskId
                - taskType
                - sourceHash
                - outputPath
                - processingOptions
                - output
                - input
            ProvisionedThroughput:
              ReadCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.min}
              WriteCapacityUnits: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.min}
        StreamSpecification:
          StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
        Tags: ${self:custom.resourceTags}

    # ============================================
    # DYNAMODB AUTO-SCALING (uses AWS service-linked role)
    # ============================================

    # Table Write Capacity
    JobsTableWriteCapacityScalableTarget:
      Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
      DependsOn: JobsTable
      Properties:
        MaxCapacity: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.max}
        MinCapacity: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.min}
        ResourceId: !Sub table/${JobsTable}
        ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits
        ServiceNamespace: dynamodb

    JobsTableWriteScalingPolicy:
      Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
      Properties:
        PolicyName: JobsTableWriteAutoScalingPolicy
        PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
        ScalingTargetId: !Ref JobsTableWriteCapacityScalableTarget
        TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
          TargetValue: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.target}
          ScaleInCooldown: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.scaleInCooldown}
          ScaleOutCooldown: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.scaleOutCooldown}

      DependsOn: ReviewResultsTable
      Properties:
        MaxCapacity: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.max}
        MinCapacity: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.min}
        ResourceId: !Sub table/${ReviewResultsTable}
        ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:ReadCapacityUnits
        ServiceNamespace: dynamodb

    ReviewResultsTableReadScalingPolicy:
      Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
      Properties:
        PolicyName: ReviewResultsTableReadAutoScalingPolicy
        PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
        ScalingTargetId: !Ref ReviewResultsTableReadCapacityScalableTarget
        TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
          TargetValue: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.target}
          ScaleInCooldown: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.scaleInCooldown}
          ScaleOutCooldown: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.scaleOutCooldown}
          PredefinedMetricSpecification:
            PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBReadCapacityUtilization

    # GSI Write Capacity
    ReviewResultsGSIWriteCapacityScalableTarget:
      Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
      DependsOn: ReviewResultsTable
      Properties:
        MaxCapacity: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.max}
        MinCapacity: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.min}
        ResourceId: !Sub table/${ReviewResultsTable}/index/targetLang-judgedAt-index
        ScalableDimension: dynamodb:index:WriteCapacityUnits
        ServiceNamespace: dynamodb

    ReviewResultsGSIWriteScalingPolicy:
      Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
      Properties:
        PolicyName: ReviewResultsGSIWriteAutoScalingPolicy
        PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
        ScalingTargetId: !Ref ReviewResultsGSIWriteCapacityScalableTarget
        TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
          TargetValue: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.target}
          ScaleInCooldown: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.scaleInCooldown}
          ScaleOutCooldown: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.write.${self:custom.stage}.scaleOutCooldown}
          PredefinedMetricSpecification:
            PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization

    # GSI Read Capacity
    ReviewResultsGSIReadCapacityScalableTarget:
      Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
      DependsOn: ReviewResultsTable
      Properties:
        MaxCapacity: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.max}
        MinCapacity: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.min}
        ResourceId: !Sub table/${ReviewResultsTable}/index/targetLang-judgedAt-index
        ScalableDimension: dynamodb:index:ReadCapacityUnits
        ServiceNamespace: dynamodb

    ReviewResultsGSIReadScalingPolicy:
      Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
      Properties:
        PolicyName: ReviewResultsGSIReadAutoScalingPolicy
        PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
        ScalingTargetId: !Ref ReviewResultsGSIReadCapacityScalableTarget
        TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
          TargetValue: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.target}
          ScaleInCooldown: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.scaleInCooldown}
          ScaleOutCooldown: ${self:custom.dynamoCapacity.read.${self:custom.stage}.scaleOutCooldown}
          PredefinedMetricSpecification:
            PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBReadCapacityUtilization

  Outputs:
    JobsTableName:
      Value: !Ref JobsTable
      Export:
        Name: translated-language-system--dynamodb-jobs-name-${self:custom.stage}
    JobsTableArn:
      Value: !GetAtt JobsTable.Arn
      Export:
        Name: translated-language-system--dynamodb-jobs-arn-${self:custom.stage}
    PromptsVersionsTableName:
      Value: !Ref PromptsVersionsTable
      Export:
        Name: translated-language-system--prompts-versions-name-${self:custom.stage}
    PromptsLiveTableName:
      Value: !Ref PromptsLiveTable
      Export:
        Name: translated-language-system--prompts-live-name-${self:custom.stage}
    ReviewResultsTableName:
      Value: !Ref ReviewResultsTable
      Export:
        Name: translated-language-system--dynamodb-review-results-name-${self:custom.stage}

services:
  # DynamoDB Local
  dynamodb:
    image: amazon/dynamodb-local:latest
    container_name: translated-language-system-dynamodb
    ports:
      - '8000:8000'
    command: '-jar DynamoDBLocal.jar -sharedDb -inMemory'
    healthcheck:
      test: ['CMD-SHELL', 'curl -s http://localhost:8000 || exit 1']
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10

  # DynamoDB Admin UI
  dynamodb-admin:
    image: aaronshaf/dynamodb-admin:latest
    container_name: translated-language-system-dynamodb-admin
    ports:
      - '8001:8001'
    environment:
      DYNAMO_ENDPOINT: http://dynamodb:8000
      AWS_REGION: eu-west-1
      AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: local
      AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: local
    depends_on:
      dynamodb:
        condition: service_healthy

  # ElasticMQ (SQS Local)
  sqs:
    image: softwaremill/elasticmq-native:latest
    container_name: translated-language-system-sqs
    ports:
      - '9324:9324' # SQS API
      - '9325:9325' # SQS UI
    volumes:
      - ./config/elasticmq.conf:/opt/elasticmq.conf
    healthcheck:
      test: ['CMD-SHELL', 'curl -s http://localhost:9324 || exit 1']
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10

  # MinIO (S3 Local)
  s3:
    image: minio/minio:latest
    container_name: translated-language-system-s3
    ports:
      - '9000:9000' # S3 API
      - '9001:9001' # MinIO Console
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: localaccess
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: localsecret
    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
    healthcheck:
      test: ['CMD', 'mc', 'ready', 'local']
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
    volumes:
      - s3-data:/data

  # Setup container - runs existing scripts
  setup:
    image: amazon/aws-cli:latest
    container_name: translated-language-system-setup
    environment:
      AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: local
      AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: local
      AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: eu-west-1
      DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT: http://dynamodb:8000
      S3_ENDPOINT: http://s3:9000
    volumes:
      - ./scripts:/scripts:ro
    entrypoint: /bin/sh
    command:
      - -c
      - |
        /scripts/create-tables.sh && /scripts/create-bucket.sh
    depends_on:
      dynamodb:
        condition: service_healthy
      s3:
        condition: service_healthy

volumes:
  s3-data:
